---
title: "ebic_score"
generated: true
description: "Extended Bayesian Information Criterion of a precision estimate."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.connectivity`](../nitrix-stats-connectivity.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ebic_score -->
```python
ebic_score(theta: Float[Array, 'p p'], S: Float[Array, 'p p'], n: int | Float[Array, ''], *, gamma: float = 0.5, edge_tol: float = 1e-08) -> Float[Array, '']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ebic_score -->
Extended Bayesian Information Criterion of a precision estimate.

`EBIC_gamma = n (tr(S Theta) - log det Theta) + E log n + 4 gamma E log p`
(Foygel & Drton 2010), where `E` is the number of off-diagonal edges
(upper-triangle entries with `|theta| > edge_tol`, counted once).  The
Gaussian-graphical-model term `-2 loglik = n (tr(S Theta) - log det Theta)`
uses the cuSOLVER-free rolled-Cholesky `log det`.  `gamma in [0, 1]`
tunes the extra sparsity prior (`gamma = 0` recovers plain BIC); pick the
path point with the **smallest** EBIC.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ebic_score -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `theta` | `Float` | `p` × `p` | — | — |
| `S` | `Float` | `p` × `p` | — | — |
| `n` | `int | Float[Array, '']` | — | — | — |
| `gamma` | `float` | — | `0.5` | — |
| `edge_tol` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape —.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ebic_score -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
